initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(attendance.link_to_member) AS member_count
FROM attendance
JOIN event ON attendance.link_to_event = event.event_id
JOIN member ON attendance.link_to_member = member.member_id
WHERE event.event_name = 'Community Theater'
  AND strftime('%Y', event.event_date) = '2019';
